zh.St. Peter's Monastery, Gloucester, Engla: 英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Berkeley於大約1101年出生在蘇格蘭班福爾時，他的父親Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartley34歲，母親Rissa Marie le Littleton29歲。他和Helena FitzHarding至少有1個兒子。他去世於1177年之後，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾。

zh-hans.St. Peter's Monastery, Gloucester, Engla: 英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger de Berkeley于大约1101年出生在苏格兰班福爾时，他的父亲Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartley34岁，母亲Rissa Marie le Littleton29岁。他和Helena FitzHarding至少有1个儿子。他去世于1177年之后，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Berkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Barclay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Berkley
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Berkeley was born about 1101, in Banffshire, Scotland, his father, Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartley, was 34 and his mother, Rissa Marie le Littleton, was 29. He had at least 1 son with Helena FitzHarding. He died after 1177, and was buried in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Berkeley est né environ 1101, à Banffshire, Écosse, son père, Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartley, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Rissa Marie le Littleton, avait 29 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Helena FitzHarding. Il est décédé après 1177, et a été enterré à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger de Berkeley um 1101 in Banffshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartley 34 und seine Mutter Rissa Marie le Littleton 29. Er hatte mit Helena FitzHarding mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb nach 1177 und wurde in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Berkeley è nato il circa 1101 nel Banffshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartley, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Rissa Marie le Littleton, aveva 29 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Helena FitzHarding. Morì dopo il 1177, e fu sepolto a Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Berkeley Castle, Berkeley, Gloucester, E: イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリー
ja.Banffshire, Scotland: スコットランドバンフシュアイア
ja.St. Peter's Monastery, Gloucester, Engla: イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Berkeleyが約1101年にスコットランドバンフシュアイアで生まれた時，父Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartleyは34歳，母Rissa Marie le Littletonは29歳であった。彼はHelena FitzHardingとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1177年以後に死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Berkeley(이)가 대략 1101년 스컷랜드 반프실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartley(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Rissa Marie le Littleton(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Helena FitzHarding(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1177년 이후 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Berkeley nasceu aproximadamente 1101, em Banffshire, Scotland, seu pai, Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartley, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Rissa Marie le Littleton, tinha 29 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Helena FitzHarding. Ele faleceu após 1177, e foi sepultado em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Berkeley родился около 1101 г. в местности банффшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartley было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Rissa Marie le Littleton, 29. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Helena FitzHarding. Он умер после 1177 г. и был похоронен в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

sm.about 1101–after 1177: e tusa o le 1101–ina ua ma'ea le 1177

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger de Berkeley nació aproximadamente 1101, en Banffshire, Scotland, su papá, Roger de Berkeley Second Laird of Gartley, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Rissa Marie le Littleton, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Helena FitzHarding. Murió después de 1177, y fue sepultado en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
